description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Black round dial with a rotating bezel and fluorescent green hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a fluorescent green stitch and tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and date aperture on the 3 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 1 year
